name: RichChat
summary: Local chat thread (role='log') whose messages can embed interactive valet content, including forms; use it for guided, in-app conversational flows you drive yourself — experimental, no network built in.

props.name: onFormSubmit
props.description:
Called when a form message collects a response; `index` is the
message's position in the caller's `messages` array (system
messages included), not its position in the rendered list.

props.name: labels
props.description:
Instance-level overrides for this component's i18n strings (the send button
aria-label). Wins over the `ValetLocaleProvider` value, which in turn wins
over the built-in English defaults (A11Y S8 resolution contract; see
`src/system/locale.tsx`).

props.name: compact
props.description:
Zeros all layout spacing (pad, gap, and spacing-margins) where supported and
cascades to spacing-aware descendants. Does not touch control insets,
structural geometry, border-radius, glyph sizes, or alignment. `compact={false}`
opts a subtree back out of an inherited compact.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Keep messages concise and chunked; prefer multiple short assistant turns over monolithic walls of text.
Embed small forms inline when it reduces friction (e.g., date picker, numeric choice); submit via `onFormSubmit`.
Use avatars consistently for roles. Set `userAvatar` / `systemAvatar` to reinforce identity.
Respect scroll context. With `constrainHeight` the thread scrolls locally; otherwise ensure the page layout accommodates tall threads.
Provide optimistic UI for outgoing messages. Animate entries to maintain a conversational rhythm.
Sanitize or gate untrusted JSX. RichChat renders JSX content; ensure sources are trusted.

The message list is a polite live region (role='log', aria-relevant='additions') so screen readers announce new turns as they arrive. While a turn is composing (a message with `typing: true`), the list reports aria-busy so announcements are held until the message settles — set `typing` on the in-flight message and clear it when the content is final.
The typing indicator honors `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`: the bouncing dots stop animating and stay visible at full opacity, so the composing state still reads without motion.
Internationalize the built-in labels with the `labels` prop (instance-level) or a `ValetLocaleProvider` (app-wide). Resolution is instance `labels` > provider strings > built-in English.
